release_notes: v0.9.4 — Fixed a real factual-accuracy bug on the Investigation page where AI reasoning could state things not supported by the evidence provided, and where a failed AI response could render as if it were a genuine, high-confidence finding; both are now caught and clearly flagged instead. Visibility Collection runs now write a diagnostic log to disk so a stalled or crashed run can be reviewed afterward, and Atlas now warns before starting a likely-redundant rerun of the same prompt set. Added DeepSeek as a supported AI provider. Knowledge now includes an own-site audit (flags if your site blocks AI crawlers like GPTBot), a Search Volume tab that checks the prompt library against real Google Search Console query data, and Web Intelligence now checks robots.txt for AI-crawler blocking. Trends now flags a real visibility drop for a provider. Raw Data responses can now be flagged for review with an audit trail. Renamed "Comp Shop" to "Price Comparison" for clarity.
